_paused.AUDUSD: Was the strongest performer without spread modeled (6/6 walk-forward folds profitable, +1320.39). With REAL historical spread included, it reverses completely: 0/6 folds profitable, -1331.02 total, across all 1597 trades in the sample. High trade frequency (~23/day) multiplying even a modest per-trade spread cost erases the entire edge. Revisit only alongside a much stricter entry filter (higher min_score) that meaningfully cuts trade frequency, validated with --include-spread and folds before redeploying.
_paused.USDCHF: Net negative and inconsistent (1/6 folds, -215.26 with spread) even after raising min_score to 5. No demonstrated edge under this strategy.
_paused.XAUUSD: Net negative and inconsistent (2/6 folds without spread; not yet re-tested with spread). Contradicts the earlier walk-forward finding that gold carried most of the edge -- worth a fresh look at the H1 session strategy/hours later, not during the challenge window.
